allow: Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\(""fs""\); const html=fs.readFileSync\(""public/index.html"",""utf8""\); const m=html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); if\(!m\){console.log\(""No script found""\);process.exit\(1\);} try{new Function\(m[1]\);console.log\(""Syntax OK""\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(""Syntax error:"",e.message\)}')
